prestazioni: Engine swap to a fully built EA82T (turbocharged 1.8L flat-4, 120hp stock) with forged internals: Manley forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL race bearings, and a billet crankshaft from JE Pistons. Turbocharger upgrade to a Garrett T25 .60 trim with a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold by Perrin Performance, paired with a 38mm external wastegate from Turbosmart.

Fuel system overhaul: Walbro 255 LPH in-tank fuel pump, 650cc/min injectors from ID1000, and a custom fuel rail by Killer B Motorsport. Standalone ECU conversion to a Haltech Elite 2500 with individual cylinder tuning, boost control, and launch control. Intercooler upgrade to a custom front-mount unit by Mishimoto with a 2.5-inch core and silicone couplers from PTP.

Drivetrain reinforcement: Kaaz 1.5-way limited-slip differential for the 5-speed manual transmission, upgraded clutch from ACT with a 6-puck sprung disc and pressure plate rated for 400 ft-lbs of torque. Custom driveshaft by Drive Shaft Shop with CV joints and a reinforced center support bearing. Suspension overhaul with Ohlins DFV coilovers (custom valved for the Leone’s 96.5-inch wheelbase), Whiteline adjustable sway bars (22mm front, 18mm rear), and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro for the rear trailing arms.
estetica: Full JDM-inspired widebody conversion using a custom Rocket Bunny-inspired kit for the Leone Station Wagon, fabricated from carbon fiber and fiberglass with aggressive fender flares (3.5-inch wider front, 4-inch wider rear). Front bumper replacement with a custom lip spoiler by Varis, incorporating integrated fog lights and a tow hook delete. Rear bumper modified with a custom diffuser by Seibon Carbon, featuring dual exhaust cutouts for a 3-inch titanium exhaust system by Tomei.

Custom roof spoiler by APR Performance, designed specifically for the Leone’s wagon profile, with a carbon fiber construction and adjustable angle for downforce tuning. Side skirts from a 1980s Subaru RX Turbo (EA82T) adapted for the Leone’s chassis, paired with custom carbon fiber side mirrors from Vertex. Wheel setup: Work Meister S1 3P 15x9 +15 front and 15x10 +20 rear, wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (225/50/15 front, 245/45/15 rear).

Interior overhaul: Full Recaro SRD bucket seats with custom mounting brackets for the Leone’s floorpan, wrapped in Alcantara with red stitching by Status Racing. Custom roll cage by Custom Cages UK, bolt-in design with a 6-point harness bar and integrated gussets for chassis rigidity. Steering wheel replacement with a Nardi Classic 350mm suede wheel, paired with a NRG quick-release hub. Gauge cluster upgrade to a Defi Advance BF series with oil pressure, boost, and wideband AFR readouts, mounted in a custom carbon fiber pod by AEM.
